hero.subtitle: WUIC turns metadata into complete UIs: CRUD, dashboards, workflows, reports and AI chatbots. Less code, more capabilities.

features.sectionSubtitle: Every capability is baked into the framework. Configure metadata, the runtime does the rest.

metadataDriven.title: Metadata-Driven
metadataDriven.desc: Define tables and columns as metadata: the framework generates CRUD, filtering, paging and validation automatically.

visualDesigner.title: Visual Designer
visualDesigner.desc: Drag-and-drop dashboards with datasource, repeater, chart, map, scheduler and dynamic templates.

workflowEngine.title: Workflow Engine
workflowEngine.desc: Designer and runner for operational processes: conditional graphs, steps, custom actions and automatic triggers.

reportBuilder.title: Report Builder
reportBuilder.desc: Report generation with embedded designer and runtime viewer, PDF/Excel export.

ragChatbot.title: RAG Chatbot
ragChatbot.desc: Built-in AI assistant that queries the codebase in natural language with hybrid retrieval + LLM.

multiDbms.title: Multi-DBMS
multiDbms.desc: SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL and Oracle supported via drop-in providers. Switch database without rewriting code.

gallery.sectionSubtitle: Real UIs generated by the framework. Every component is configurable via metadata.

quickstart.sectionSubtitle: Download the ZIP, configure the database, start. No complex installation.
quickstart.step1Code: Download the ZIP from Downloads and extract it

community.title: Community
community.text: Join the WUIC forum: ask questions, share solutions, propose features and meet other developers.

cta.title: Ready to build?
cta.text: Download the framework, try the live demo or explore features in detail.

features.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to build enterprise business applications, without reinventing the wheel.

dataSource.title: DataSource
dataSource.desc: Orchestrates data reading, filtering, paging and sorting. Connects to a metadata route and feeds data to repeaters.

dataRepeater.title: DataRepeater
dataRepeater.desc: Renders data into visual archetypes: list, grid, spreadsheet, kanban, tree, carousel, map, calendar, chart.

crud.title: Automatic CRUD
crud.desc: Insert, update, delete generated from metadata. Validation, required fields, lookup and suggest configurable without code.

filterBar.title: FilterBar
filterBar.desc: Dynamic filter bar with column-type operators, advanced filter, sorting, grouping and page size.

designer.title: Designer
designer.desc: Runtime drag-and-drop dashboard: datasource, repeater, chart, HTML templates, custom CSS. Saved to metadata DB.

fieldWidgets.title: Field Widgets
fieldWidgets.desc: Edit-form widget library: text, number, date, lookup, upload, code editor, HTML area, dictionary, many-to-many.

parametricDialog.title: Parametric Dialog
parametricDialog.desc: Parametric dialog for edit forms, multi-step wizards, record details. Tabs, validation, custom actions.

themes.title: Themes and Styles
themes.desc: Light/dark theme, conditional row/cell styles driven by JS callbacks, custom CSS per board.

workflowDesigner.title: Workflow Designer
workflowDesigner.desc: Visual graph editor: nodes, conditions, actions, triggers. Runtime runner for step-by-step execution.

reportDesigner.title: Report Designer
reportDesigner.desc: Embedded Stimulsoft designer for report layouts. Runtime viewer with PDF, Excel, Word export.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.desc: Recurring task scheduling with cron expressions, retry, timeout, logging. Integrated .NET hosted service.

notifications.title: Realtime Notifications
notifications.desc: WebSocket push for user notifications. SqlDependency or polling, bell icon with badge, mark as read.

multiDbms.title: Multi-DBMS
multiDbms.desc: SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle via drop-in providers. Switch database with one line in appsettings.json.

auth.title: Auth & Sessions
auth.desc: Cookie-based login (client or server-managed), OAuth/OIDC, roles, per-route permissions, single-session enforcement.

rag.title: RAG Chatbot
rag.desc: AI assistant that queries the codebase via hybrid BM25 + vector + LoRA cross-encoder index. Retrieval + Claude LLM.

i18n.title: Translations
i18n.desc: Multi-language UI (i18n) + per-record/per-field data translation. 5 languages supported out of the box.

pricing.pageSubtitle: Two tiers, no surprises. Pick the one that fits your project.

comingSoon.title: Online payments coming soon
comingSoon.body: Card / PayPal payments will be activated shortly. In the meantime, email us at {{email}} to purchase a license: we'll reply within 24 business hours with payment instructions.

dev.label: Developer
dev.desc: For individual developers or personal/internal projects. All the framework core, without premium features.

highlights.ui: All base UI components (List, Form, Kanban, Chart, …)

pro.label: Professional
pro.desc: Complete framework with visual designers, AI and offline-first. Tailored for software houses shipping customer projects.

highlights.spreadsheet: Spreadsheet + Pivot Grid + auto-materialized Pivot Builder

maintenance.title: Maintenance window: 12 months of updates
maintenance.p1: The license lets you use all versions released within 1 year from the license start date. After that year, the installed version keeps working indefinitely; to move to a newer version just buy an extension license at half price:
maintenance.note: The extension license opens a new 12-month window of future updates. No renewal obligation: you pay only when you want to upgrade.

fingerprints.title: Multiple installations? Extra fingerprints at €200 / year
fingerprints.p1: Each license includes a set number of machine fingerprints (1 for Developer, 3 for Professional). If you need to deploy on more servers, every extra fingerprint costs €200 / year and is handled as a patch to the existing license (same holder, same expiry).
fingerprints.example: Software house example: you buy Pro (€1,200) + 3 extra fingerprints (€600) = €1,800 / year to cover 1 dev environment + 5 end-customer servers. No technical limit on the number of fingerprints a license can authorize.

rows.listForm: List / Grid, Form / Dialog, Datasource, DataRepeater
rows.archetypes: Kanban, Scheduler, Map, Tree, Carousel, Chart
rows.filters: Filters, paging, sorting, Excel export / import
rows.widgets: Field widgets (lookup, upload, HTML editor, code editor, …)
rows.themes: PrimeNG themes, dark mode, multi-language internationalization
rows.authz: Authorization (route / table / column), audit trail, logic delete

trial.title: Free Trial mode
trial.text: Without a license the framework runs in Trial mode with a 20-record limit per query: enough to evaluate UI, designers and app flows. Not suitable for production.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Developer and Professional licenses include documentation access, updates within the maintenance window, and the public bug tracker. Dedicated support (email/phone SLA, onboarding, consulting) is sold separately.
faq.q2: Can I sell WUIC-based projects to my customers?
faq.a2: Yes, and that's exactly what Pro is designed for. The Professional license includes 3 fingerprints (typically 1 dev environment + 2 end-customer servers): you deliver the project, install it on the customer's server, add the server's fingerprint to your license. If deployments exceed 2, you buy extra fingerprints at €200 / year each. End customers do not need their own WUIC license — your license authorizes their server.
faq.q3: Is the license per developer or per machine?
faq.a3: Per machine (machineFingerprint), computed as SHA256 hash of machine name + domain + OS + Machine GUID. A single license can authorize N machines by including N fingerprints in the signed payload. The number of included fingerprints per tier is fixed (1 Dev, 3 Pro); extras are bought at €200 / year each.
faq.q4: How do I add a new fingerprint to my license?
faq.a4: Grab the machineFingerprint from the customer server by calling GET /api/Meta/LicenseStatus on that host. Send it to us and we issue an updated license with the new fingerprint added (existing ones stay valid). Replace license-payload and license-signature in appsettings.json, restart the backend, done.
faq.q5: What if I change server? (swap, not addition)
faq.a5: We issue an updated license with the new machineFingerprint replacing the old one. No extra cost for server replacement within the same maintenance window.
faq.q6: How do I upgrade from Developer to Professional?
faq.a6: Any time, by paying the pro-rata difference based on the remaining months of the current license. Backend restart and the premium features are immediately active.

contact.title: Ready to start?
contact.text: Download WUIC for free in Trial mode, or contact us for a license.

purchaseDialog.title: Buy license
purchaseDialog.emailHint: You'll receive the license file at this address after payment.
purchaseDialog.fingerprintHint: Get it from GET /api/Meta/LicenseStatus on the target server. Optional: you can send it after installing WUIC.
purchaseDialog.notConfigured: PayPal isn't configured on this site yet. Contact us directly at licenses@wuic-framework.com to complete the purchase.

success.title: Payment received!
success.text: Thanks, the payment of {{ amount }} {{ currency }} for {{ product }} was recorded.
success.step1: If you don't have WUIC yet, download it and start it in trial mode
success.step3: Email us fingerprint + this Order ID — we issue the license within 24 business hours

purchaseDialog.footerNote: Secure payment handled by PayPal. Pay with your PayPal account or credit card (no PayPal account required).
purchaseDialog.needsConsent: To display and use the PayPal payment button you must first accept third-party cookies (marketing category) via the cookie banner. You can re-open the banner with the button below.

invoicing.intro: Fill these fields only if you need an invoice issued to a company or VAT-registered entity. Private buyers can leave everything blank.
invoicing.vatHint: For Italian buyers: P.IVA or codice fiscale. For foreign buyers: VAT number with country prefix.
invoicing.sdiHint: 7 characters. Leave blank if you're not an Italian taxpayer. Use 0000000 for Italian private buyers (or put your PEC address here if you only have PEC), XXXXXXX for foreign buyers.
invoicing.addressPlaceholder: e.g. 123 Main St, New York NY 10001, USA

downloads.pageSubtitle: Pick the package that fits your needs. All include .NET 10 backend + Angular 21 frontend.
downloads.noRelease: No package published yet. Check back later.

cards.srcText: Contain the C# + Angular sources. Ideal for development: you can edit, compile and customize the project. Use rename-project.ps1 to rename the project.
cards.iisText: Output of dotnet publish ready for IIS. Angular already compiled. Extract into the site physical path, configure appsettings.json, start.
cards.ragText: Packages with RAG include the vector index and Python server. After extraction run pwsh rag-setup.ps1 for automated setup.
cards.tutorialText: Packages with the -bak- suffix include a binary backup (.bak) of the tutorial database ready to restore — they require SQL Server 2022 or newer (backup format) but are much faster to restore (seconds vs several minutes). Packages with SQL tutorial (without -bak-) contain .sql scripts compatible from SQL Server 2017 onwards (compat level 140): pick these if your instance is older or on Express edition, at the cost of a slower import.

requirements.title: System requirements
requirements.subtitle: Minimum stack to run WUIC in production on IIS.
requirements.os: Windows Server: minimum 2019 (official ASP.NET Core 10 floor). Recommended 2022 or 2025. 2016 / 2012 R2 / 2008 R2 out of support.
requirements.runtime: ASP.NET Core Runtime 10 — Hosting Bundle on IIS. IIS 10+. App pool set to No Managed Code, Web-WebSockets feature enabled.
requirements.sql: SQL Server: minimum 2017 (compat 140, for STRING_AGG and DROP IF EXISTS). Recommended 2019 / 2022. Express / Standard / Developer / Enterprise editions equivalent for the metadata schema.
requirements.tls: TLS 1.2+ enabled OS-side (default-on from WS 2016+). Required by the Microsoft.Data.SqlClient 5.2 driver.

olderDownloads.pageSubtitle: The last 5 published versions. Older releases are removed automatically on each new push.

gallery.pageSubtitle: Real animations of the main WUIC features. Click any demo to enlarge; jump to the feature's docs from the card link.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Lorenzo Castrico — WUIC Framework. All rights reserved.
footer.attribution: WUIC bundles third-party components: Syncfusion Essential Studio (Community License), Stimulsoft Reports, Monaco Editor, and open-source libraries (PrimeNG / Angular / FullCalendar). Syncfusion is a registered trademark of Syncfusion Inc.

legal.pageSubtitle: Information about the product owner, licenses of third-party components bundled inside WUIC, and terms of use.

licensor.title: Product owner
licensor.body: WUIC Framework is developed and distributed by Lorenzo Castrico, a sole proprietor registered in Italy (VAT IT02098880681). All rights on the source code, the WUIC brand and marketing materials belong to the owner.

commercial.title: WUIC commercial license
commercial.body: The framework is distributed under a commercial license (Developer / Professional). Purchase authorizes the use of the framework to develop commercial applications. Price and scope details are on the pricing page.

thirdParty.title: Third-party components
thirdParty.body: WUIC bundles the following third-party components, each under its own license:
thirdParty.syncfusion: Syncfusion Essential Studio (Community License held by the owner, approved by Syncfusion Inc. on 2026-04-23, ticket #832836). The license covers the redistribution of the components inside the WUIC framework. WUIC licensees who want to use Syncfusion directly outside the WUIC wrappers must purchase their own Syncfusion license from syncfusion.com.
thirdParty.stimulsoft: Stimulsoft Reports (commercial license held by the owner with redistribution clause). Used by the report designer and viewer.
thirdParty.openSource: PrimeNG, Angular, FullCalendar, Monaco Editor, and other open-source libraries: each under its own license (MIT, Apache 2.0, BSD). Full license texts are shipped in the distributed ZIP packages.
thirdParty.fullNotices: Complete notices (LICENSE-Syncfusion.txt, LICENSE-Python.txt, etc.) are bundled in every WUIC deployment ZIP, at the root and in the relevant subfolders.

trademarks.title: Trademarks
trademarks.body: Syncfusion is a registered trademark of Syncfusion Inc. Stimulsoft is a trademark of Stimulsoft. Microsoft, WideWorldImporters, SQL Server are trademarks of Microsoft Corporation. All other trademarks mentioned are property of their respective owners.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For licensing, sales or clarification queries: licensing@wuic-framework.com.

privacy.pageSubtitle: How we process your personal data under EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Italian D.Lgs. 196/2003 (Privacy Code).

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: The data controller is Lorenzo Castrico, Italian sole proprietor (VAT IT02098880681). Contact: licensing@wuic-framework.com.

data.title: Data we collect
data.intro: Through wuic-framework.com we collect the following categories of personal data:
data.navigation: Browsing data: IP address, browser user-agent, request timestamps, visited pages. Collected automatically by the web server logs.
data.preferences: Technical preferences: selected language, cookie consent state. Stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and never transmitted to our servers.
data.transactions: Payment and license data: PayPal email, payer name, transaction identifiers, amount, purchased product, machine fingerprint of the installation server. Transmitted by PayPal at checkout and stored for license issuance and support.
data.support: Support data: content of emails sent to licensing@wuic-framework.com or other published contact addresses.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
purposes.contract: Performance of the license contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR): issuing, renewing and supporting purchased WUIC licenses.
purposes.security: Legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR): fraud prevention, technical diagnostics, security of the site and our systems.
purposes.legal: Legal obligations (Art. 6.1.c GDPR): 10-year retention of tax documents (Art. 2220 Italian Civil Code), VAT and anti-money-laundering duties.
purposes.consent: Consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR): installation of third-party cookies (e.g. PayPal) subject to the cookie banner. Consent is revocable at any time.

thirdParties.title: Recipients and third parties
thirdParties.intro: Your data may be disclosed to the following parties, each acting either as independent controller or processor:
thirdParties.paypal: PayPal (Europe) S.a.r.l. et Cie, S.C.A.: payment processing. PayPal acts as an independent controller for data collected during checkout. Privacy policy at paypal.com/privacy.
thirdParties.hosting: Contabo GmbH (Germany): website and application server hosting. Access logs retained for 30 days for security purposes.
thirdParties.email: Email provider (SMTP): delivery of support and license emails.
thirdParties.noTransfer: No non-EU transfers: all the providers listed above process data within the European Economic Area or, in PayPal's case, under EU Standard Contractual Clauses.

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.navigation: Browsing logs: 30 days from the request date, except for security investigation needs.
retention.preferences: localStorage preferences: persistent until you manually clear them from your browser settings.
retention.transactions: Transactional data and invoices: 10 years from issuance, as required by Art. 2220 Italian Civil Code and tax law.
retention.support: Support communications: 3 years from ticket closure, for historical archive and legal defense.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: As a data subject, under Arts. 15-22 GDPR you have the right to:
rights.access: access your personal data and receive a copy;
rights.erasure: request erasure of data, subject to legal retention obligations;
rights.restriction: restrict processing in case of contestation;
rights.portability: receive your data in a structured, transferable format;
rights.object: object to processing based on legitimate interest;
rights.consent: withdraw consent at any time (without prejudice to prior lawful processing).
rights.exercise: To exercise these rights write to licensing@wuic-framework.com. We will respond within 30 days.
rights.complaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (Garante) if you believe processing violates applicable law.

cookies.title: Cookies and tracking technologies
cookies.body: The site uses strictly necessary technical cookies and, upon consent, third-party cookies for PayPal checkout. Full details in the Cookie Policy.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: This policy may be updated to reflect regulatory or operational changes. The last-updated date is shown at the top. For material changes we will notify registered users by email.

cookies.pageSubtitle: Which cookies and similar technologies we use, why, and how to manage them.

what.title: What are cookies
what.body: Cookies are small text files a site may store in your browser. This site also uses localStorage, a similar but more modern technology. We treat them both the same way in this policy.

categories.title: Categories used
categories.intro: We classify cookies and storage in two categories: technical (always on, strictly necessary) and marketing (activated only with consent).

technical.title: Technical cookies
technical.body: Cookies and storage strictly necessary for the site to function. No prior consent required (Art. 122 Italian Privacy Code).
technical.langPurpose: Stores the selected language to display content in your preferred language.
technical.consentPurpose: Stores your cookie-consent preferences so we don't show the banner on every visit.

marketing.title: Third-party cookies (marketing)
marketing.body: Cookies installed by third-party providers when you use specific site features. Blocked by default; activated only after your explicit consent via the cookie banner.
marketing.paypalPurpose: PayPal checkout operation, fraud prevention, PayPal UI localization.
marketing.paypalPolicy: PayPal acts as an independent controller. Full notice: paypal.com/privacy.

manage.title: Manage your preferences
manage.body: You can change your cookie consent preferences at any time using the button below. Our banner will re-appear so you can update your choices.
manage.browser: Alternatively, you can manage cookies directly from your browser settings (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) — this will block them for ALL sites, not only wuic-framework.com.

related.title: Related documents
related.body: See also our Privacy Policy for processing purposes and legal bases, and the Terms of Sale for commercial terms.

terms.pageSubtitle: Terms and conditions governing the purchase and use of WUIC Framework licenses.

provider.title: Seller
provider.body: The seller is Lorenzo Castrico, Italian sole proprietor (VAT IT02098880681). Contact: licensing@wuic-framework.com, website wuic-framework.com.

service.title: Subject of the service
service.body: The service consists of granting a license to use the WUIC Framework (proprietary software product) according to the purchased tier (Developer or Professional). The license is limited to the number of authorized machine fingerprints and the duration specified at purchase.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.body: Prices are in Euro (EUR), VAT excluded where applicable. Current prices are published on the pricing page and may be updated without notice; the applicable price is the one in force at the time of order confirmation.
pricing.extras: Extra fingerprint: €200 / year each. Maintenance extension: €300 (Dev) / €600 (Pro) for 12 additional months.

payment.title: Payment
payment.body: Payment is via PayPal. Credit/debit cards (no PayPal account required) and PayPal balance are accepted. Electronic invoice is issued within 12 days of payment and sent via Italian SdI system to the recipient code provided.

delivery.title: License delivery
delivery.body: The license (RSA-2048 signed payload) is issued manually within 2 business days of receiving: email, machine fingerprint of the installation server, PayPal payment confirmation. The key is emailed to the address provided at checkout.

withdrawal.title: Right of withdrawal
withdrawal.consumer: Consumer (B2C): under Art. 52 of the Italian Consumer Code (D.Lgs. 206/2005), the consumer has 14 days from contract conclusion to exercise the right of withdrawal without justification.
withdrawal.exception: Digital content exception: under Art. 59(1)(o) of the Italian Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal is forfeited once performance of the contract (license issuance and delivery) has begun with the consumer's express consent and acknowledgment of loss of withdrawal right. By clicking 'Purchase' and receiving the license key, you expressly accept this clause.
withdrawal.b2b: The right of withdrawal does not apply to business customers (B2B).

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.body: The license includes 12 months of maintenance from issuance: framework updates, bug fixes, email support. After that, maintenance can be extended with a renewal. The framework is provided 'as is': the warranty covers functioning according to documentation but not fitness for a specific customer use-case.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the extent permitted by applicable law, seller liability for direct damages arising from use of the framework shall not exceed the license amount paid by the customer in the 12 months preceding the alleged event. Indirect damages, consequential damages, loss of profit and loss of data are excluded.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: Source code, trademarks, documentation and all materials related to WUIC Framework are and remain the exclusive property of Lorenzo Castrico. The license grants a limited, non-transferable right to use; it is not a transfer of intellectual property. The customer remains the owner of the source code of their own applications developed using WUIC, within the limits described on the legal page.

law.title: Governing law and jurisdiction
law.body: The contract is governed by Italian law. For disputes with consumers, the court of the consumer's residence or domicile applies (Art. 66-bis Italian Consumer Code). For B2B disputes, the exclusive jurisdiction is the Court of Naples, Italy.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: These terms may be updated. For contracts already in progress, the terms in force at the time of signing apply.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For sales queries, licensing info or complaints: licensing@wuic-framework.com.

cookieBanner.message: We use technical cookies (always on) to run the site. We also use third-party cookies (PayPal) for checkout, installed only with your consent.

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.intro: Choose which cookie categories to accept. You can change this at any time from the Cookie Policy page.

technical.title: Technical cookies
technical.desc: Strictly necessary for site operation (selected language, consent state). No consent required under Art. 122 Italian Privacy Code.

marketing.title: Third-party cookies (PayPal)
